title: betonica nivea subsp. masandarana
intro: Betonica nivea subsp. masandarana, also known as Himalayan betony, is a subspecies of the Betonica nivea plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Himalayan region. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Betonica nivea subsp. masandarana is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
